goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool' and should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 09:45'.
The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool and should be in the east
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 09:45
The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time
